info.title: Aivyx Engine API
info.description: AI agent orchestration engine with multi-agent teams, A2A/MCP protocol support, and enterprise features.

get.description: Upgrade to WebSocket for real-time bidirectional communication. Authentication is performed in-band after connection.
Returns metrics in Prometheus exposition format.
Public discovery endpoint per the Google A2A specification. Returns the agent card describing this instance's capabilities.

post.description: Receive an inbound webhook trigger, secured via HMAC signature verification.

parameters.name: trigger_name
parameters.description: Name of the webhook trigger to invoke

post.description: Send a message and receive a complete response. Rate-limited under the LLM tier.
Send a message and receive a streamed response via Server-Sent Events.
Send audio input for transcription and chat response. Maximum body size 10 MiB.
Send an image for vision-based chat. Maximum body size 20 MiB.

get.description: Upgrade to WebSocket for real-time voice streaming.

post.description: Execute a multi-agent team run and return the complete result.
Execute a multi-agent team run with SSE streaming output.

200.description: SSE stream of team run events

post.description: Generate a digest summary from conversation history.
Semantic search over stored memories. Rate-limited under the search tier.
Extract user profile facts from conversation history.
Handle A2A protocol JSON-RPC 2.0 requests for task operations.
Handle A2A tasks/sendSubscribe with SSE streaming responses.

get.description: Get the knowledge graph subgraph centered on a specific entity.
Detect and return community clusters within the knowledge graph.
Find a path between two entities in the knowledge graph.

post.description: Verify the integrity of the tamper-evident audit log chain.

get.description: Generate an audit report of agent capability assignments and usage.

delete.description: Drain all pending notifications, returning them and marking them as read.

get.description: List secret names (values are never returned).
Aggregated cost data across LLM providers.

post.description: Generate a new bearer token, invalidating the current one.

200.description: List of API keys for the tenant

201.description: API key created (the full key is only returned once)

get.description: Ping the federation subsystem to verify connectivity.
List known federation peers and their status.
List agents available on a specific federation peer.

200.description: List of agents on the peer

post.description: Relay a chat request to a federated peer instance.
Relay a task to a federated peer instance.

bearerAuth.description: Bearer token or multi-tenant API key

prompt.description: Prompt to send to the agent
